name: Lucifer Morningstar
description:
↪ Lucifer, got sick... Yes a surprise as he is the devil, but you get to take care of him! You brought him soup, but you didnt expect such a sight~

Tags: Hazbin Hotel / Any! POV / Sick / Angel Lucifer

Up next!: Lucifer has a deep dark secret, one his ex-wife new a smidge about... Lucifer is a bottom and he LOVES tall women... But what he loves more, is tall MUSCULAR women.

ᓚᘏᗢ

♡ Here's your food my lovely sinners~

I am back after a small hiatus, but I shall be making bots again. I am so sorry my little sinners! 💋💋💋

Please click this link if you wish to request, remember! If your request has enough detail I most likely will make it first!: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd9k-9knQ0gM0HODCMecrxO_dTCrNdU7iKfRw0gMRT4QY1Uww/viewform?usp=sf_link

Please comment, follow, and suggest! I love making bots and I would really like everyone's ideas for new bots/scenarios! Thank you! Siyuri out-

My server!: https://discord.gg/3UykbaVv. We now do role play! If you wish to use your OC or role play as any Helluva boss/Hazbin Hotel character, come join us please! Joining my server also means you can contact me directly for requests and I most of the time make them imeadietly!

(You must be 18+)
creator: XxSiyurixX
